title: Fix CSS Grid Layout with Inconsistent Column Width Calculation and Dynamic Item Count

statement.markdown: Given a CSS grid layout with a dynamic number of grid items, fix the bug in the function that calculates the column width. The function should return the maximum column width based on the grid item widths and the number of columns. However, due to a logical error, the function is not calculating the correct maximum column width, resulting in inconsistent grid column widths.
statement.inputFormat: A string representing the CSS grid layout, with grid items separated by commas, and their respective widths separated by spaces.
statement.outputFormat: The maximum column width calculated based on the grid item widths and the number of columns.
statement.notes: The grid layout is dynamic, meaning the number of grid items and their widths can change. The function should handle this dynamic nature of the grid layout.

constraints.description: The maximum width of a grid item

examples.explanation: The maximum column width is 300, which is the maximum width of the grid items
The maximum column width is 600, which is the maximum width of the grid items

hints.text: First hint text: The bug is likely due to incorrect handling of the dynamic number of grid items

editorial.title: Editorial title
editorial.intuition: Explanation of the correct approach: Use a greedy algorithm to find the maximum column width based on the grid item widths and the number of columns
editorial.bruteForce: Brute force approach summary: Iterate through each grid item and find the maximum width, then return the maximum width
editorial.optimalSolution: Optimal solution details: Use a greedy algorithm to find the maximum column width based on the grid item widths and the number of columns
editorial.proofOfCorrectness: Correctness proof: The greedy algorithm ensures that the maximum column width is found based on the grid item widths and the number of columns
editorial.dryRun: Step-by-step example run: item1 100 item2 200 item3 300
commonMistakes: Incorrect handling of dynamic number of grid items
Incorrect calculation of maximum column width
